summary.discussion: ARR reached $4.2M, exceeding the $4.0M target by 5%. Net revenue retention at 118%. Board expressed satisfaction with growth trajectory.
summary.decision: Approved revised FY2026 target of $5.5M ARR (up from $5.2M)

summary.discussion: With 14 months runway and accelerating growth, the board discussed optimal timing for Series B. Consensus: begin process in Q4 2026, target close Q1 2027.
summary.decision: Sarah to engage 2-3 investment banks for market feedback. Target raise: $20-25M at $80-100M pre-money valuation.

summary.discussion: APAC pilot (Singapore) showing early traction with 3 customers. EU data residency requirements need addressing before European launch.
summary.decision: Approved hiring APAC sales lead. EU expansion deferred to post-Series B to fund data residency infrastructure.

summary.discussion: StratumAnalytics adoption below expectations (only 6 of 14 Enterprise customers active). AI-powered workflow suggestions identified as potential differentiator.
summary.decision: Lin Wei to present AI product strategy at next board meeting. Consider strategic hire for AI/ML team lead.

summary.discussion: Engineering headcount at 95, targeting 120 by year-end. Key hire needed: VP Marketing (role open 3 months).
summary.decision: Approved increased recruiter budget. Consider fractional CMO as interim solution.
